data.text: P03/05 FELISIAN WITH MUCH WATER. AT 118.36 IT WAS VERY MOUNTAINOUS
AND BARREN. AT 150.118 IT WAS A COLD AND BARREN GROUND WITH AT
LEAST A HOPPER THERE. AT 0.60 A LARGE ISLAND WAS PRESENT WITH A
'LIGHTHOUSE' PINNACLE AT THE POINT, USE CAUTION, HOWEVER, AS A
A WATERY LANDING AWAITS BEFORE THE SHORE. AT 60.40 IT WAS AGAIN
BARREN AND ROLLING GROUND, BUT THERE WAS THE COMPANY OF TWO HOPPERS
